title: A US startup just cleared a major solid-state battery milestone – production is next
summary_1: A US startup has achieved a significant milestone in solid-state battery technology.
summary_2: This breakthrough paves the way for the next stage of development, which is production.
summary_3: The company's success marks a notable advancement in the quest for next-generation batteries.

title: ION Storage Systems Announced Successful Customer Qualification of Cornerstone™ Cell Performance, Becoming the First U.S. Solid-State Battery Tech Company to Achieve This Milestone
summary_1: ION Storage Systems announced the successful customer qualification of its Cornerstone™ cell performance.
summary_2: This achievement makes ION Storage Systems the first U.S. solid-state battery tech company to reach this milestone.
summary_3: The qualification signifies a critical step towards commercialization and market adoption of their solid-state battery technology.

title: Donut Lab solid-state battery retains 97.7% charge after 10 days in third test
summary_1: Donut Lab's solid-state battery demonstrated impressive charge retention in its third test, holding 97.7% after 10 days.
summary_2: This result further validates the performance and reliability of their solid-state battery technology.
summary_3: The sustained charge retention is a key indicator for practical applications in various electronic devices and electric vehicles.

title: Desk-calendar sized: CALB debuts 60Ah solid-state battery with 1,000 km range
summary_1: CALB has unveiled a new 60Ah solid-state battery with a claimed range of 1,000 km.
summary_2: The battery is notably compact, described as desk-calendar sized, suggesting advancements in energy density and form factor.
summary_3: This development could significantly impact the electric vehicle market by offering longer ranges in a smaller package.

title: Solid State Battery Market size to cross $27.7 Billion by 2035 |
summary_1: The global solid-state battery market is projected to exceed $27.7 billion by 2035.
summary_2: This significant growth indicates a strong demand and rapid adoption of solid-state battery technology in the coming years.
summary_3: The market expansion is driven by advancements in battery performance, safety, and the increasing needs of electric vehicles and consumer electronics.

title: Donut Lab says latest test proves its solid-state battery isn’t a supercapacitor
summary_1: Donut Lab has released data from its latest test, asserting that its solid-state battery is not a supercapacitor.
summary_2: This clarification addresses potential market confusion and highlights the battery's distinct energy storage capabilities.
summary_3: The company aims to position its technology as a true solid-state battery solution for demanding applications.

title: Donut Lab publishes data on charge retention
summary_1: Donut Lab has published data detailing the charge retention capabilities of its solid-state battery.
summary_2: The published data provides evidence of the battery's performance over time.
summary_3: This transparency aims to build confidence in the technology's reliability for future applications.

title: LG에너지솔루션 vs 삼성SDI…인터배터리서 '배터리 특허전' 공개 충돌
summary_1: LG Energy Solution and Samsung SDI engaged in a public debate regarding battery patents at InterBattery.
summary_2: A question was raised about the necessity of prismatic cases for solid-state batteries, given their enhanced safety.
summary_3: Samsung SDI responded by emphasizing their tailored strategies for different market segments.

title: K배터리, 팽팽한 특허 '신경전'…"특허 침해 좌시하지 않을 것"
summary_1: A representative from LG Energy Solution inquired about Samsung SDI's most fundamental and powerful patent.
summary_2: Another LG Energy Solution employee questioned the need for prismatic cases if solid-state batteries are inherently safe.
summary_3: This exchange highlights the intense patent competition and differing technological perspectives between the two companies.

title: "각형 특허만 1200건"…삼성SDI "기술 도용 좌시 않겠다"
summary_1: Samsung SDI stated they hold 1,200 patents related to prismatic battery cases and will not tolerate technology infringement.
summary_2: An LG Energy Solution representative questioned the necessity of prismatic form factors for solid-state batteries, given their safety.
summary_3: Samsung SDI's head responded by highlighting their customized strategies for various market needs.

title: LG엔솔 "카피 멈추고 수업료 내라" vs 삼성SDI "국내 타사 특허 고작 30건...
summary_1: An LG Energy Solution employee questioned the need for heavy prismatic cases in electric vehicles and UAMs if solid-state batteries are sufficiently safe.
summary_2: This point was raised during a discussion at InterBattery, targeting potential overlap in Samsung SDI's product portfolio.
summary_3: The exchange underscores the competitive landscape and differing technological approaches in the battery industry.

title: [인터배터리 2026] 개막 D-1···관전 포인트는 '전고체 배터리'
summary_1: InterBattery 2026 is set to highlight solid-state batteries as a key area of focus.
summary_2: Hana Technology will be showcasing its turnkey solutions for the entire solid-state battery manufacturing process.
summary_3: The company emphasizes its capability to supply integrated solutions for all existing lithium-ion battery form factors, including cylindrical, prismatic, and pouch types.

title: 유럽·북미가 먼저 찾는다… 성일하이텍, 글로벌 '폐배터리 허브' 도약
summary_1: Sungil Hi-Tech is emerging as a global hub for battery recycling, attracting interest from Europe and North America.
summary_2: The company aims to become a crucial part of the global battery material supply chain.
summary_3: Mirae Industry and Mirae NanoTech, involved in semiconductor, display equipment, and lithium carbonate processing respectively, are also showing strong performance.

title: "차세대 ESS·EV 시장을 겨냥한 배터리 핵심 소재 기술을 선보인다"… 동...
summary_1: Dongwon Systems introduced its 'Coated Anode Foil (PCAF)' at InterBattery 2026, a key material for next-generation ESS and EV markets.
summary_2: This marks the first domestic unveiling of this advanced battery material in Korea.
summary_3: The coated anode foil utilizes a carbon-based primer applied to aluminum foil, enhancing battery performance.

title: [인터배터리 2026 개막] 2차전지 기술부터 공급망까지 생태계 아우른다
summary_1: The 2026 InterBattery exhibition, the largest of its kind in Korea, commenced today at COEX.
summary_2: This 14th iteration of the event covers the entire battery ecosystem, from technology to supply chains.
summary_3: The exhibition will run for three days, showcasing the latest advancements in the battery industry.

title: "적자 2조 늪"…K-배터리, 성장 대신 '수성' 선회하나
summary_1: Major South Korean battery companies recorded a combined operating loss of approximately 2 trillion won last year.
summary_2: This financial performance suggests a potential shift from growth-focused strategies to a focus on profitability and stability.
summary_3: The industry is facing challenges that necessitate a re-evaluation of business approaches.

title: LG에너지솔루션 김제영 CTO, 'AI 에이전트 활용 R&D 혁신' 제시
summary_1: LG Energy Solution's CTO, Kim Gye-young, proposed innovations in R&D utilizing AI agents.
summary_2: He also outlined market-specific strategies including high-energy density batteries for premium EVs, cost-effective solutions for mid-to-low-end markets, and LFP-based products for ESS.
summary_3: Furthermore, he mentioned advancements in next-generation batteries such as sodium-ion and solid-state batteries.
